connectorUiConfig.title: Field Effect MDR Data Connector (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: This solution enables Microsoft Sentinel to ingest Field Effect MDR data using the Codeless Connector Framework (CCF). The connector polls the Field Effect ARO API and sends results to a Log Analytics custom table for hunting, correlation, and alerting within Sentinel.

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

instructionSteps.title: Configure Field Effect Connector
instructionSteps.description:
1. In the Field Effect MDR portal, generate an API Key. 
2. Copy your Organization ID from the portal. 
3. Enter both values below and connect.

parameters.label: API Key
parameters.placeholder: Enter your Field Effect API Key
parameters.name: bearerToken

parameters.label: Organization ID
parameters.placeholder: Enter your Field Effect Organization ID
parameters.name: organizationId
